info.name: CMS Service API
info.description: CMS Service API. Fetch endpoints require header x-project-key (set in environment). Create/Update/Delete require Authorization: Bearer {{bearer_token}} from POST /authenticate-project.

request.description: Returns JWT token. Set ct_client_id, ct_client_secret, ct_project_key in environment. Copy response token to bearer_token and project_key.
Requires valid or expired Bearer token. Returns new JWT.
Get all configuration slices for the business unit.
Alias for GET /configuration — returns all configuration slices for the business unit.
Import default content types from samples. Requires Bearer token.

item.name: Puck Pages
item.description: Puck-editor page management (CRUD, states, versions, published/preview).

request.description: Returns the page object together with its draft and published states.
Auto-saves a draft state and a version entry.
Removes the page together with all its states and versions.
Returns draft state if available, falls back to published.
Promotes the draft state to published. ?clearDraft=true removes the draft afterwards.
Deletes the draft state, reverting the page to the last published version.

item.name: Puck Contents
item.description: Puck-editor content item management (CRUD, states, versions, published/preview).

request.description: Optional query param: ?contentType=hero to filter by content type.
Returns the content item together with its draft and published states.
Auto-saves a draft state and a version entry.
Removes the content item together with all its states and versions.
Returns draft state if available, falls back to published.
Promotes the draft state to published. ?clearDraft=true removes the draft afterwards.
Deletes the draft state, reverting the content to the last published version.
